principle: không suy luận, phán đoán — chỉ act khi VERIFIED qua execution
headline: 10/10 rounds done. 1 real bug discovered + 1 cosmetic fix shipped. 5 prior speculations retired.

R1_dialog_runtime_off_by_one.hypothesis: insertion_order=N vs event_id suffix=N+1 (off-by-one) breaks downstream
R1_dialog_runtime_off_by_one.method: grep replay_metadata_registry.ts for event_id usage + Vitest test 3 cases (uniqueness 1000 calls, sequential, suffix=order+1)
R1_dialog_runtime_off_by_one.result: RETIRED — event_id used as Map key (uniqueness only), no consumer parses suffix. 3/3 test PASS proves uniqueness invariant holds.
R1_dialog_runtime_off_by_one.verdict: Not a bug. Prior flag was speculation.

R2_zod_strict_validate.hypothesis: Some quest fail strict zod schema
R2_zod_strict_validate.method: Define zod schema covering 18 fields + objective union, parse all 150 quests

R3_dialog_reachability.hypothesis: Some dialog node orphan (unreachable from intro) or dangling branch
R3_dialog_reachability.method: BFS from intro, check (a) all nodes visited (b) every branch.next resolves (c) accept has on_enter (d) terminal has no branches

R4_npc_strict_ref.hypothesis: Some giver/target NPC doesn't exist or can_give_quest=false
R4_npc_strict_ref.method: Cross-ref every giver_npc_id + target_npc_id against NPC_438
R4_npc_strict_ref.result: 3/3 test PASS — every ref valid, name + scene_id match, can_give_quest=true

R5_chain_playability.hypothesis: Some chain has impossible progression (prereq level higher OR missing)
R5_chain_playability.method: Simulate player traversal pos 0→end with player_level = max(previous_quest_level_req)
R5_chain_playability.result: 2/2 test PASS — all 8 chains traversable + every chain ≥5 quest
R5_chain_playability.verdict: Clean (after earlier B2 fix in commit cddfa3f)

R6_reward_statistical.hypothesis: Reward outliers OR no correlation with level
R6_reward_statistical.method: z-score for exp + Spearman rank correlation + gold ceiling
R6_reward_statistical.result: 4/4 test PASS — 0 outliers (|z|>3), Spearman ρ>0.5, no gold>50k

R7_generator_fuzz_10seeds.hypothesis: Generator stable only with default seed; might break with other seeds
R7_generator_fuzz_10seeds.method: Re-seed generator with seeds {0,1,7,13,42,1337,99991,271828,1414213,31415926}, run all 7 rules per seed

R8_file_integrity.method: Byte-scan 6 output files for BOM, ctrl chars, UTF-8 fatal decode, CR/CRLF
R8_file_integrity.result: Initial scan: 5 files had CRLF (Windows git autocrlf artifact, 360 CR total). Verified JSON.parse handles trailing CR via whitespace tolerance — benign. STILL fixed for repo hygiene.
R8_file_integrity.fix: Added .gitattributes pinning *.jsonl/*.json/*.ts to eol=lf. Regenerated all output files. Normalized quest_constants.json (CRLF→LF in-place).

R9_cross_validate_after_fix.method: Run all R1-R8 derived test suites after all fixes applied
R9_cross_validate_after_fix.result: cmd-quest 3 file/10 test PASS · cmd-dialog 2 file/7 test PASS · 0 fail

R10_sha_snapshot.method: SHA-256 fingerprint of 14 output files for replay verification

parallel_validation_loop_10x_full_backen.command: SVTK_REAL_PG_URL + TEST_DB_URL set, npx vitest run, 10 sequential rounds
parallel_validation_loop_10x_full_backen.determinism: 10/10 IDENTICAL — zero flake, zero regression across 35 minutes wall-clock

speculations_retired: dialog_runtime.ts:138-140 off-by-one — proved benign via uniqueness test
CR bytes break parse — proved JSON.parse tolerates trailing CR
scope_routed_to_other_cmd_no_action: threat_constants.json 5 keys missing _BP suffix — CMD1/CMD2 boundary
231 eslint return-type/unused-vars in tests/tools — CMD4 scope
5 determinism warns in tests/tools — CMD4 scope
verified_invariants: quest_full.jsonl: 150 entries, all 13 audit rules clean
dialog_tree.jsonl: 150 entries, BFS-reachable, 100% accept on_enter aligned with quest_id
Generator deterministic across 3+ consecutive runs (same SHA)
Generator robust across 10 different seeds (0 violations on 1500 quests)
Full backend test suite 338 file/5895 pass/0 fail stable across 10 rounds
status: DONE — CMD3 standby. 17 task-rounds across 2 sessions all completed with verified evidence.
